faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in Metuchen, NJ?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination services in Metuchen typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a mouse problem in Metuchen?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day service for most Metuchen properties when you call early in the day. Our team understands that mouse infestations require immediate attention to prevent property damage and health risks, so we prioritize rapid response times throughout the Metuchen area.

faqs.question: What methods do you use for mouse extermination in Metuchen homes?
faqs.answer: We use an integrated approach including thorough inspection, strategic trap placement, rodenticide application when appropriate, entry point sealing, and sanitation recommendations. Our methods are safe for families and pets while being highly effective at eliminating mouse populations in Metuchen properties.

faqs.question: Do you provide follow-up visits after the initial mouse treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, our mouse extermination service includes follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination. We typically schedule a follow-up inspection 7-14 days after the initial treatment to monitor traps, assess activity levels, and make any necessary adjustments to guarantee your Metuchen property remains mouse-free.
